title: The Program That Won’t Install
ticket: Mike tried installing a program but nothing happened.
clue: He double-clicked the installer but closed it too fast.
tooltip: Installers usually show a setup window.

interactiveDemo.prompt: What should you look for after opening an installer?
interactiveDemo.hint: Installers usually guide you with a setup wizard.

breakFixTask: Installer blocked by SmartScreen. Allow it.
explainQuestions: Why do programs fail to install?
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without hints?

translationTerms.plain: A program that adds another program to your computer.
translationTerms.why: You need it to install apps correctly.
